Containers.Name: UGREEN iDX6011 Pro Front Panel
Containers.Description:
Touch LCD dashboard + smart front-panel LEDs for the **UGREEN NASync iDX6011 Pro**, running natively on Unraid - no UGOS required.
- Seven swipeable pages of live stats on the 258x960 front touchscreen (CPU, memory, per-interface network, per-disk temps/usage/health, GPU/NPU, power draw, array + notifications, docker) plus an interactive touch Settings page. - Smart front LEDs (power / 2x LAN / 6x disk): drive presence, SMART health (green/amber/red) and LAN link, updated live. - Self-contained: downloads a SHA256-verified payload and registers its own EFI boot entry (no UGOS/NVMe/grub dependency). Model-gated via DMI - no-ops on other hardware.
Requires the BIOS Watchdog Timer disabled and the panel EFI entry set first in the BIOS boot order. See the project README before installing.
Containers.Changes: ###2026.07.12 - Initial release. The full front panel for the UGREEN NASync iDX6011 Pro on Unraid.
